content: For short one-shot sound effects with low latency, community guidance increasingly steers away from 'audioplayers' (reported jank/performance issues, and its PlayerMode.lowLatency mode on Android has known bugs when combined with ReleaseMode.stop -- sound only plays once) toward 'just_audio' for general playback or 'flutter_soloud' (SoLoud bindings) specifically when low-latency, game-like sound effects matter. For a single short calm two-tone chime played once at timer completion (not looping, not overlapping), the strict low-latency requirement is less critical than for a game; audioplayers or just_audio should suffice, but avoid lowLatency+stop combination bug if using audioplayers.
